approval.description: accept — 0 concerns or nit only; accept_with_concerns — there are minor concerns; reject — there are blocker/major concerns.

concerns.description: List of concerns about the proposed fix. Each concern is tied to a specific spot in the Proposed fix or to an unresolved finding.

evidence.description: A concrete anchor: file:line from the Proposed fix, a verbatim quote, or the id of a Findings entry that remains unresolved.
